steps.title: Spot the key signal
steps.content: The passage explicitly presents perspectives from three different family members—the mother, father, and daughter. This structure of multiple sources is the decisive clue for what the blank should express.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Distinct means “recognizably different from each other” and fits because each perspective comes from a different person in the family.
The other choices don't fit: unknown and unintended contradict the clear, deliberate structure, while required doesn't relate to the plurality of perspectives.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
